core_insight: translate share-with-remainder into mod-4 and mod-6 conditions, then test candidates
trap: testing only one of the two moduli

core_insight: each handshake contributes 2 ends so the total degree is even; parity rules out 4
trap: assuming 4 ends each is possible without the parity check

core_insight: biggest digits into the biggest place values for max, smallest for min, then take the difference
trap: reporting one total instead of the max-minus-min difference

core_insight: defer doublings to last; order steps by how much each later doubling multiplies; halve the smallest amount
trap: doubling too early or halving the wrong amount

core_insight: count the digit separately in the units, tens and hundreds places rather than writing all the numbers
trap: missing the extra zeros in the tens and hundreds places

core_insight: iterate to find the 8-cycle, then index the 2024th term via 2024 mod 8 (pre-period matters)
trap: off-by-one: the cycle starts at the 3rd term, not the 1st

core_insight: case-split on the first step (50cm vs 100cm) to derive f(n)=f(n-1)+f(n-3), then build the table
trap: enumerating paths instead of finding the recurrence

core_insight: rotate 180 then reflect vertically equals a horizontal mirror; count letters with a horizontal axis of symmetry
students to teacher-classes to teachers, dividing by classes-per-teacher at the end
trap: forgetting each teacher covers several classes

core_insight: alphabetical blocks of 3!=6; the 19th lands in the 4th block

invariant: summing all lines counts each number twice
core_insight: sum of all line-totals = twice the sum of all numbers, so the unknowns are forced
the drop-the-hundreds map enters a 4-cycle; index 2022 by the period
a cake has 5 decoratable sides not 6; 5 x 9 x 9
trap: counting 6 faces or including the base

core_insight: 3 distinct odds give an odd sum; every odd value from 9 to 309 is reachable; count them
trap: not proving every intermediate value is reachable

core_insight: C(5,2) ways for one pair times C(6,2) for the other = 10 x 15
trap: adding instead of multiplying the two combination counts

invariant: net edges fold to equal box edges
core_insight: label the net edges L/W/H; the 32 and 12/10 constraints pin L,W,H; then volume
trap: wrong face adjacency or dimension assignment
